name: union-steward-dashboard
description: Modular Union Steward Dashboard for Google Sheets

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run build && jest --verbose
scripts.test:webapp: jest test/19_WebDashAuth.test.js test/20_WebDashConfigReader.test.js test/21_WebDashDataService.test.js test/22_WebDashApp.test.js test/23_PortalSheets.test.js test/24_WeeklyQuestions.test.js test/25_WorkloadService.test.js test/26_QAForum.test.js test/27_TimelineService.test.js test/28_FailsafeService.test.js test/29_Migrations.test.js test/auth-denial.test.js test/negative-paths.test.js --verbose
scripts.ci: npm run clean && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:unit
scripts.deploy: npm run lint && npm run test:guards && npm run test:unit && npm run build:prod && clasp push
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run lint && npm run build && clasp push --force

author: Dashboard Team
